summary: Iteration 5 - Market Hours Awareness Testing. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All market hours UI features working correctly. Key fix verified: Forex and Indian markets show CLOSED status on Sunday, prices are stable (not ticking), and appropriate UI banners are displayed.

minor.issue: CoinGecko rate limiting causing crypto data to be empty intermittently (429 Too Many Requests)
minor.note: External API dependency - not a code issue. Crypto data loads when rate limit recovers.

backend: market_status has crypto, forex, indian keys
Forex prices stable when market closed (verified 12 pairs)
Indian prices stable when market closed (verified 44 assets)
GET /api/auth/me - returns user info with token
gainers and losers fields present in response
frontend: Dashboard shows market status bar: 'MARKET HOURS • Crypto 24/7 • Forex Closed • NSE Closed'
Dashboard shows LIVE indicator with tick counter
Dashboard Forex mini panel shows CLOSED badge
Dashboard Forex mini panel shows 'Showing last closing prices' text
Markets page Forex tab shows 'Forex (12) CLOSED'
Markets page Indian tab shows 'Indian (44) CLOSED'
Markets page Forex tab shows amber closed banner
Markets page Indian tab shows amber closed banner
Forex closed banner text: 'Forex market is currently closed. Showing last closing prices. Opens Sunday 5 PM ET.'
Indian closed banner text: 'Indian market (NSE) is currently closed. Showing last closing prices. Opens Mon-Fri 9:15 AM IST.'

backend.is_forex_market_open(): Returns false on Sunday before 5PM ET
backend.get_market_status(): Returns correct open/closed status for all markets
backend._tick(): Only applies micro-movements to open markets (crypto only on Sunday)

frontend.DashboardPage.js: Shows market status bar and Forex CLOSED badge when markets closed
frontend.MarketsPage.js: Shows CLOSED text in tabs and amber banners for closed markets

context_for_next_testing_agent: Market hours awareness fix is complete and verified. On Sunday: forex.open=false, indian.open=false, crypto.open=true. Backend _tick() only applies micro-movements to open markets. Frontend shows CLOSED badges, amber banners, and 'last closing prices' text. CoinGecko rate limiting may cause crypto data to be empty intermittently - this is an external API issue, not a code bug.
